^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
647 GG0130B1_ORAL_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130B1_ORAL_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130B1 Self Care: Oral Hygiene Ability at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to perform oral hygiene tasks at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
